\tzpentry{ID3856}{Delta Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3856 introduces Delta Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \delta\!\left(\frac{16}{15}\right)=\frac{1}{15},\quad \delta\!\left(\frac{10}{9}\right)=\frac{1}{9},\quad \delta(\chi)=\frac{5}{27}. \end{equation}
